services.title: SMTP2GO query
services.summary: Diff sender domains vs config; optional --import from live API (JSON on stdout).

services.title: SMTP2GO maintain
services.summary: Add missing sender domains and trigger verification for managed entries.

next_steps: Run `hdc run infrastructure smtp2go query --` to verify sender domains and DNS checklists.
Apply dns_checklist rows via Cloudflare or BIND, then re-run query until DKIM and return-path verify.
SMTP relay credentials remain in postfix-relay (`HDC_POSTFIX_RELAY_SMTP_*`), not this package.
